title: Senior Financial Analyst - IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
company: IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
